meta.name: PhonoDeck UI Map
meta.purpose: Single source of truth for PhonoDeck flows, screens, components, sources, playback, and state. Keep this in sync with Sources/PhonoDeck and docs/design/phonodeck-ui-mockup.html. When a feature/component is added or renamed, update this file FIRST, then the mockup, then the SwiftUI code.
meta.app: PhonoDeck — a unified music app. Apple platforms (macOS/iOS/watchOS/tvOS) are NATIVE SwiftUI; Windows desktop + Web are .NET/TS (see platforms).

platforms._decision: OPEN — recommend per agent research. Shared capability/source model across all targets; per-platform native UI.
platforms.apple: macOS (P0), iOS, watchOS, tvOS — native SwiftUI; watch/tv build on the Mac playback/session model (don't duplicate service logic).
platforms.windows: .NET (Core). 'Fastest/most responsive on Windows' → candidates: WinUI 3 / Windows App SDK (native Fluent) or Avalonia UI (cross-platform .NET; can also target Web via WASM). To decide.
platforms.web: Web player — candidates: React/TS (matches this Storybook + tessera/sideport stack) or Avalonia WASM / Blazor. To decide.
platforms.designSystem: Lead with Apple design (HIG); borrow FEATURES (not chrome) from Apple Music + Spotify. On Windows/Web, translate to the platform's idioms while keeping IA/flows/capability-honesty identical.

accounts.youtube: YouTube Premium (active) + Google OAuth desktop flow — P0 source.
accounts.spotify: Free account (can upgrade to Premium) — planned source; Connect/Web API scopes TBD.
accounts.appleMusic: 1-month trial active. Used for DESIGN INSPIRATION only via Playwright/integrated browser (music.apple.com); user signs in. Not a PhonoDeck playback source (Apple Music API is separate).

meta.reflects: CONSOLIDATED TARGET design (from Apple Music + Spotify research via UX Architect / UI Visual / Integration I/O agents). Validate in ui-lab Storybook, then build in SwiftUI. The prior implemented code is the baseline this consolidates.

list.nativeRole: Song-first discovery, playlists, and policy-compliant embedded playback

auth.model: Google OAuth — Desktop installed-app flow (system browser + PKCE + loopback redirect)
auth.api: YouTube Data API v3 only for metadata/account/write operations; undocumented YouTube Music web metadata is disabled by policy

list.playbackDetail: Visible official youtube.com/embed IFrame in WKWebView (YouTubeMusicWebPlayerController); no hidden/background audio; cannot own AVAudioSession/system Now Playing.

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.detail: Official YouTube Data API search only; no undocumented YouTube Music metadata fallback.

capabilities.name: Discovery
capabilities.detail: Cached music searches, local PhonoDeck history, account surfaces when connected.

capabilities.name: Playlists
capabilities.detail: Read/create/add/share via official YouTube account playlist API.

capabilities.name: Playback
capabilities.detail: Visible official YouTube player; no hidden audio/background player.

capabilities.name: Downloads
capabilities.detail: YouTube audiovisual downloads not allowed without approval.

list.nativeRole: Videos, clips, and the visible official YouTube player

auth.model: Shares Google OAuth with YouTube Music

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.detail: Official YouTube video search for clips and music videos.

capabilities.name: Discovery
capabilities.detail: YouTube-wide videos, activity, channels, subscriptions, playlists where scopes allow.

capabilities.name: Playlists
capabilities.detail: Read/create/add/share YouTube playlists via official account APIs.

capabilities.name: Playback
capabilities.detail: Visible official YouTube player; no hidden audio/background player.

capabilities.name: Downloads
capabilities.detail: Not allowed without approval.

list.nativeRole: Primary native playback, library, and download source

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.detail: Search music libraries from a configured Plex Media Server.

capabilities.name: Discovery
capabilities.detail: Albums, artists, playlists, ratings, recent server activity.

capabilities.name: Playlists
capabilities.detail: Plex playlist read/write after token-based server auth.

capabilities.name: Playback
capabilities.detail: Native playback for user-owned media served by Plex.

capabilities.name: Downloads
capabilities.detail: Offline copies for user-owned Plex media when server permits.

list.nativeRole: Metadata, library surfaces, and Spotify Connect control
list.playbackPolicy: externalRemoteControl (Spotify Connect) — native streaming requires approved SDK

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.detail: Spotify Web API metadata search.

capabilities.name: Discovery
capabilities.detail: Recently played, top tracks/artists, saved library, recommendations where scopes allow.

capabilities.name: Playlists
capabilities.detail: Create/modify Spotify playlists with playlist scopes.

capabilities.name: Playback
capabilities.detail: Spotify Connect control; native streaming needs Spotify-approved SDK.

capabilities.name: Downloads
capabilities.detail: Spotify offline downloads not exposed for third-party storage.

list.nativeRole: User-owned files, imports, and iTunes XML compatibility

auth.model: None — local file access (user-selected, sandbox entitlement)

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.detail: Index imported files and iTunes XML libraries.

capabilities.name: Discovery
capabilities.detail: Albums, artists, genres, recently played, smart lists.

capabilities.name: Playlists
capabilities.detail: Local and imported playlist management.

capabilities.name: Playback
capabilities.detail: Native AVFoundation playback.

capabilities.name: Downloads
capabilities.detail: Files are already user-owned local media.

navigation._model: Sources/PhonoDeck/App/AppState.swift — LibrarySection enum; AppState.selectedSection (persisted in UserDefaults key 'selectedSection'); default = library.
navigation.windowTitle: DYNAMIC = current section name (Home, Search, a playlist's name, 'Now Playing' in full screen). NEVER 'PhonoDeck' or a static 'Music' (HIG: don't title the window with the app name; <15 chars). Brand identity lives in the SIDEBAR HEADER (icon + 'PhonoDeck' wordmark), the App menu, the About box, and the Welcome sheet.
navigation.detailRouting: Single adaptive Home + sections. LibraryHomeView fallback deferred until native sources land.

sidebar.brandHeader: App icon mark + 'PhonoDeck' wordmark (.headline) at the top of the sidebar — the canonical brand placement (NOT the window title).

screens.name: Library — Empty / First-run
contains: Connect YouTube / Add Spotify / Add Plex buttons
screens.shows: when librarySongs + playlists + activity + subscriptions all empty

screens.name: Playlists
contains: TrackTable (# · Title · Artist · Album · Time, sortable)

screens.name: Albums
screens.phase5Rule: Do not present YouTube video groupings as canonical albums. If only YouTube data is available, label the surface limited/derived or show the limited empty state until Plex, Spotify, or Own Files catalog metadata is ready.

screens.name: Artists
screens.phase5Rule: Do not present YouTube channel/result groupings as canonical artists. Cinematic ArtistPageView requires real provider artist imagery, bio, and facts.

screens.name: Storage Center
screens.phase6Rule: This surface manages metadata/artwork cache and supported-source storage truth. YouTube/Spotify media downloads are policy-blocked and never primary enabled actions.

screens.name: Devices
screens.phase6Rule: Devices is route capability/readiness, not device inventory. Do not fabricate HomePod/Cast/device/tier/history data beyond public APIs and system UI.

screens.name: Provider Lab Diagnostics
screens.status: production diagnostics surface if exposed; hide from shipping sidebar only if product chooses not to ship diagnostics

screens.name: Settings
screens.layout: native grouped Form (.formStyle(.grouped)); self-scrolling, rendered OUTSIDE the roadmap ScrollView to avoid nested scroll
contains: Section 'Music Services' = MusicServicesSection (one ServiceAccountRow per source: YouTube & YouTube Music, Spotify, Plex, Own Files)
Section 'Playback' = YouTube Music Engine menu picker + Result Mode menu picker
Section 'YouTube Access' (only when signed in) = ScopeDisclosurePanel

screens.name: Now Playing (right panel)
contains: videoSurface (visible YouTube embed OR hidden state)
screens.note: Currently a fixed right column shown when shouldShowNowPlayingPanel (selectedVideo != nil || isVideoVisible || currentVideoID != nil). NOT a burger-triggered slide-in. See glossary + consolidationNotes.

rightPanel._decision: ONE trailing inspector (420pt) with a segmented tab strip; replaces the crammed fixed nowPlayingPanel + ad-hoc inspector/related/upNext panels. Bottom NowPlayingBar = transport only.

tabs.title: Now Playing
tabs.content: REGULAR PLAYER for all sources: title/artist/album·year·duration, Like, Add, Share, transport (shuffle/prev/play/next/repeat) + scrubber. AUDIO-FIRST Song/Video toggle (default SONG = artwork-forward; VIDEO = clip). Media slot = a DISCRETE contained 16:9 visible official youtube.com/embed iframe for YT (>=200px, IFrame-API driven) or large artwork for native. Honest one-line note for YT (system routing/AirPlay unavailable).

tabs.title: Up Next
tabs.content: Canonical queue: current pinned (waveform indicator), drag-reorder, remove, Clear, + Autoplay toggle ('PhonoDeck Radio').

tabs.title: Lyrics
tabs.content: Time-synced highlight when a licensed provider returns timed data; else static; else honest empty state. Attribution required.

tabs.title: About
tabs.content: Artist hero + bio/trivia (Wikipedia CC BY-SA), credits (MusicBrainz), related songs (labeled 'built by PhonoDeck from YouTube search').

rightPanel.ambientBackground: Behind the Now Playing media, render an artwork-derived AMBIENT GRADIENT (blurred dominant colors) that adapts to the current track — validated by Apple Music's full-screen player. Honors Reduce Motion (no animated shift) and Increase Contrast (solid fallback).
rightPanel.fullScreen: Optional full-screen Now Playing takeover (COMPANION to this inspector, not a replacement): centered 16:9 media (the visible youtube.com/embed for YT; large artwork for native) over the ambient backdrop, big title/artist + Like + overflow, scrubber, transport, volume, Lyrics toggle. View > Full Screen Player; Esc closes back to the inspector. The right inspector stays the default so the required YT player is always visible.
rightPanel.defaultVisibility: Hidden first run; auto-opens to Now Playing when a YT track starts (the required visible player); persists last open/tab in AppStorage. Narrow window: collapse inspector first UNLESS a YT video is playing (then collapse the sidebar first so the required player never disappears).

features._source: Integration I/O feasibility matrix — honest per source (active/limited/planned/unavailable).
features._appleMusicTeardown: 2026-06-20 authenticated Apple Music walkthrough (Edge-over-CDP, screenshots ~/.phonodeck-cdp/*.png). VALIDATED: 16:9 video region in Now Playing (= our visible YT iframe), graceful lyrics omission when unavailable (= our provider-gated lyrics), single-click play, numbered tracklists. ADOPTED: artwork-derived ambient backdrop, eyebrow provenance labels on Home, cinematic artist page, optional full-screen player. DIVERGENCE: we keep a persistent right inspector (desktop deck) instead of a full-screen-only player; heart=YouTube Like vs Apple's star=Favorite (keep per-source honest verb).
features._youtubeMusicTeardown: 2026-06-20 authenticated YouTube Music walkthrough (Edge-over-CDP, screenshots ~/.phonodeck-cdp/ytm-*.png). KEY: prominent SONG/VIDEO toggle on the player — in SONG mode it shows ARTWORK (audio-first), video is opt-in (validates PhonoDeck audio-first + discrete iframe). Right player tabs UP NEXT / LYRICS / RELATED ~= our Now Playing/Up Next/Lyrics/About. Bottom bar shows year inline (artist · year). RELATED = 'You might also like' + Recommended playlists. Home = mood/genre chips + personalized 'Listen again' (named provenance). Downloads exist in the YT Music UI but are first-party Premium only — NOT replicable via API.
features._spotifyTeardown: 2026-06-20 authenticated Spotify web walkthrough (Edge-over-CDP, ~/.phonodeck-cdp/sp-*.png). Patterns to consider: (1) collapsible 'Your Library' panel with FILTER CHIPS (Playlists/Artists/Podcasts) + in-line search + sort (Recents) — richer than a static sidebar; (2) MINIPLAYER = a small floating always-on-top now-playing/video window ('control your music and watch videos without interruptions') — aligns with our audio-first discrete player; (3) right Now Playing view sections = About the artist (bio + monthly listeners), Credits (performers/writers/producers + Show all), On tour (concerts), Next in queue — validates + extends our rich Info inspector; (4) tinted ARTIST hero (photo + huge name over artwork-derived color) + Verified badge + monthly-listeners + Follow + green Play FAB; Popular list shows PLAY COUNTS per track; (5) 'Made For {user}' personalization + 'Import your music from other apps'. HONEST source note: FREE Spotify cannot stream via the Web Playback SDK (Premium-only); PhonoDeck + Spotify = metadata/library + Spotify Connect REMOTE control of Spotify's own players, NOT in-app audio. ADOPT: library filter chips; artist subscribers/views stat; concerts (PLANNED, Songkick/Bandsintown); optional Miniplayer (audio-first compact player).
features._plexTeardown: 2026-06-20 Plex web home (Edge-over-CDP, ~/.phonodeck-cdp/plex-02-home.png). Dark + AMBER (#e5a00d) theme; top tabs Home/Trending/Activity/Find Friends/My Profile; left rail Home/Discover/Watchlist/Live TV/Movies/TV. KEY IDEA (user): the home AGGREGATES across configured services — 'Continue Watching' (resume), 'Recommended on Your Services' (Discover, cross-service), 'Your Selected Services' (connected providers). ADOPTED for PhonoDeck music: 'New From Your Services' merged discovery shelf + 'Your Services' row, each item source-marked + provenance-labeled (see features.discoveryHome). Plex MUSIC library was still being built (empty) at capture time — revisit Plexamp-style music UI later.
features._spotifyEmbedResearch: 2026-06-20 confirmed via developer.spotify.com/documentation/embeds: the official Spotify iFrame API gives third parties a CONTROLLABLE VISIBLE embed (createController + loadUri/play/pause/resume/togglePlay/seek + playback_update events). = Spotify in-app playback WITHOUT the Web Playback SDK and WITHOUT app registration; 30-second previews for all, full tracks when signed into Premium IN the player. Implemented as PlaybackPlan.embedded(WebEmbed provider:.spotify) + SpotifyEmbed helper, parallel to YouTube. See features.spotifyEmbed.

homeTopPicks.path: Personalized Home hero: TopPicksShelf of BigPickCards. Each card carries an EYEBROW label naming its real provenance (e.g. 'From your YouTube activity', 'Because you played {x}', 'Updated playlist', 'Made by you').
homeTopPicks.ui: Apple Music 'Top Picks for You' pattern but provenance is labeled truthfully — NEVER 'YouTube recommends'. Sits above the existing shelves on Home.

ambientBackground.path: Sample dominant colors from current artwork -> blurred multi-stop gradient behind Now Playing (inspector + full screen).
ambientBackground.ui: Adapts live to the track; honors Reduce Motion (no animation) + Increase Contrast (solid fallback). Validated by Apple Music's full-screen player.

fullScreenPlayer.path: Companion full-screen takeover to the right inspector (not a replacement).
fullScreenPlayer.ui: Centered 16:9 media (visible YT embed for YT / large artwork for native) over the ambient backdrop; title/artist + Like + overflow, scrubber, transport, volume, Lyrics toggle. View > Full Screen Player; Esc returns to the inspector.

like.path: videos.rate?rating=like (50 units) + getRating to read true state; adds to Liked videos (LL). Scope youtube/force-ssl.
like.ui: Source-truthful verb: 'Like on YouTube'. Read real state so the heart never lies. No fake 'Add to Library' for YT Music (no official save).

lyrics.path: No official YT/Spotify lyrics API. Licensed: Musixmatch Pro / LyricFind (paid, attribution, time-synced feasible). Plex/Own Files: embedded/.lrc.
lyrics.ui: Hide/disable Lyrics with 'Lyrics aren't available for this source' when no provider configured. Always show the required attribution.

about_trivia_credits.path: Bio: Wikipedia/Wikidata via MusicBrainz url-rels (CC BY-SA attribution). Credits: MusicBrainz (1 req/sec, descriptive User-Agent). YT channel 'about' for channel facts.
about_trivia_credits.ui: Label every fact with its origin; honest 'Credits not available' placeholder; never synthesize credits from the uploader.

related.path: search.list relatedToVideoId is DEPRECATED. Use search by artist/topic, channel uploads (cheap), activities. Spotify Recommendations/Related Artists deprecated for new apps (Nov 2024).
related.ui: Label by real provenance: 'More from {artist}', 'Because you searched {x}', 'From your activity' — NEVER 'YouTube recommends'.

iframe.path: youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID, IFrame Player API (enablejsapi), origin/Referer, user-initiated. The app's REGULAR PLAYER transport drives it via the API: playVideo/pauseVideo/nextVideo/previousVideo/seekTo + setVolume/mute (embed volume). Player stays VISIBLE & DISCRETE: contained 16:9, >= YouTube's 200x200 minimum (default ~360-400px wide in the inspector), not hidden/obscured, no overlays; autoplay only when >50% visible.
iframe.can: App transport play/pause/seek/next/previous and EMBED volume via the IFrame API — these are REAL controls, not faked.
iframe.cannot: Own AVAudioSession; populate MPNowPlayingInfoCenter / be driven by MPRemoteCommandCenter or media keys; control SYSTEM/hardware volume; background/hidden audio; AirPlay as an app stream; audio extraction.
iframe.ui: Discrete, well-positioned visible iframe + a REGULAR PLAYER (transport + scrubber + embed volume) that drives it. Only SYSTEM routing/AirPlay/media-key ownership stay honestly disabled for YT. Native sources additionally light up MPNowPlayingInfoCenter/MPRemoteCommandCenter/AirPlay/system volume.

spotifyEmbed.path: Official Spotify iFrame API (https://open.spotify.com/embed/iframe-api/v1): createController(el,{uri,width,height},cb) -> EmbedController.loadUri/play/pause/resume/togglePlay/seek/restart/destroy + events ready/playback_started/playback_update(playingURI,isPaused,isBuffering,duration,position). Hosted in a WKWebView and driven by the app's regular transport — the direct parallel of the YouTube IFrame API.
spotifyEmbed.cannot: Full tracks unless the listener is signed in to Spotify Premium IN the embed (else 30-second previews); own AVAudioSession / MPNowPlayingInfoCenter / media keys / system volume / AirPlay app-stream / audio extraction.
spotifyEmbed.ui: Spotify uses the SAME discrete visible-embed Now Playing treatment as YouTube (regular transport drives it via the iFrame API; system routing/keys honestly off). Preview-vs-full reflects the listener's Spotify login, surfaced honestly. Modeled as PlaybackPlan.embedded(WebEmbed provider:.spotify).

regularPlayer.path: ONE unified Now Playing surface (inspector now-tab + bottom NowPlayingBar + optional full-screen): shuffle / prev / play-pause / next / repeat, scrubber, and volume. Native sources control AVPlayer; YouTube drives the visible official iframe via the IFrame Player API.
regularPlayer.ui: Behaves like a normal music player for ALL sources. For YT the media slot is a DISCRETE contained iframe (not a full-bleed hero) with a one-line honest note that audio is the visible official player and system AirPlay/volume routing isn't available.

audioFirst.path: Song/Video toggle on Now Playing (default SONG), mirroring YouTube Music. SONG = artwork-forward (the official-audio video renders as static art in the discrete embed); VIDEO = the music-video clip in the discrete embed.
audioFirst.ui: Emphasize artwork + transport + metadata over the clip. SYSTEM controls (media keys, headset/remote, Control Center, system Now Playing, AirPlay) are FIRST-CLASS for NATIVE sources (Plex/own files via AVPlayer + MPNowPlayingInfoCenter + MPRemoteCommandCenter). For YouTube these are NOT available (the visible embed can't be driven by media keys or own an AVAudioSession) — be honest and provide on-screen transport instead. This is a key reason native/Plex is the premium listening path.

nowPlayingInfo.path: When the inspector About / Get Info opens, show every AVAILABLE fact labeled by origin. YouTube Data API videos.list -> title, channel, publishedAt (year), contentDetails.duration, statistics.viewCount/likeCount/commentCount, snippet.description. MusicBrainz -> original release year, record label, producers/songwriters/credits (1 req/s, descriptive UA). Wikipedia/Wikidata via MB url-rels -> artist trivia (CC BY-SA).
fields: Bitrate/codec (NATIVE sources ONLY — no stream access for YT)
nowPlayingInfo.ui: Facts grid + Description + Credits + artist Trivia, each with a small source tag and an honest 'not available' state. Bitrate/codec only for Plex/own files. Dislike COUNT is unavailable (YouTube removed it); like is real via getRating/statistics.

downloads.path: Song + Playlist downloads and SMART DOWNLOADS target Plex and own files (media the user owns): an offline store with size/cleanup policy; smart = auto-cache liked/most-played/next-up, auto-evict.
downloads.youtube: UNAVAILABLE: YouTube Premium offline is FIRST-PARTY ONLY; there is no official third-party offline API and downloading/extracting YT audio/video violates the API Terms (hard P0 boundary). Show an honest 'Not available for YouTube' state — never a fake download.
downloads.ui: Download (song/playlist) + a Smart Downloads toggle appear ONLY for download-capable sources; YT rows show a disabled, explained state.

accountTiers.decision: Support BOTH free and paid tiers per source, exposing only what each tier truly allows (honest, never faked). Detect the user's tier where possible and label/disable features accordingly.

youtube.free: Data API (search/playlists/ratings/info) + VISIBLE embed playback WITH ADS; no background, no offline.
youtube.premium: Same Data API. Embed is ad-free ONLY when the viewer is signed into YT Premium IN the embed's web context (third-party app webviews usually aren't, so ads may still show). Background/offline are FIRST-PARTY ONLY — not available to PhonoDeck.
youtube.note: API access does NOT change by tier; Premium perks (ad-free/background/offline) are first-party. Be honest that Premium adds little for a third-party app.

spotify.free: Web API metadata/library/playlists/search + the official Spotify iFrame EMBED plays a visible player: 30-second PREVIEWS for everyone.
spotify.premium: Same Web API; the embed plays FULL tracks when the listener is signed in to Spotify Premium IN the player. Optional extras: Web Playback SDK (in-app) + Spotify Connect remote control of other devices.
spotify.note: Playback uses the official Spotify iFrame API embed (NO app registration needed); preview-vs-full depends on the player's own Spotify login. Web Playback SDK / Connect on-demand remote = Premium-only enhancements.

plex.free: A Plex account + the user's own Plex Media Server: browse + native STREAMING of owned music is free.
plex.plexPass: Adds offline downloads/sync, loudness leveling, sonic analysis / sonically-similar, lyrics, premium music (Plexamp) features, hardware transcode. (User HAS Plex Pass.)
plex.note: Basic music playback is free; Plex Pass unlocks downloads + premium music features.

ownFiles.free: Fully owned local media — all features (play/offline) available.

unifiedLibrary.decision: MERGE playlists/albums/songs from all connected sources into unified Library views (Songs/Albums/Artists/Playlists), beautifully blended — but EVERY item ALWAYS carries a DISCRETE source marker so provenance is never ambiguous.
unifiedLibrary.marker: Source dot/pill (SourcePill / src-dot / card-src) in each source's tint (YouTube red, YT Music pink, Spotify green, Plex amber) + SF Symbol: dense rows = colored dot; cards = small corner badge; detail = full SourcePill. Label/tooltip names the source.
unifiedLibrary.filtering: Source filter chips at the top of Library views (All · YouTube · YT Music · Spotify · Plex) + optional group-by-source. DEDUPE the same track across sources into one row carrying multiple markers; play picks the best-available source per policy/tier.
unifiedLibrary.honesty: Per-row capabilities follow the item's source+tier (e.g., a Spotify row can't play in-app on a free account — show the honest state). Cross-source playlists are labeled 'PhonoDeck playlist (mixed sources)'.

discoveryHome.path: Plex-style aggregated discovery on Home: a 'New From Your Services' shelf merges new releases/recommendations across configured sources (YouTube, YT Music, Spotify, Plex), each card SOURCE-MARKED and labeled by which service surfaced it ('New on YT Music', 'New on Spotify', 'New in your library'). Plus a 'Your Services' row showing connected sources with their TIER stated honestly ('Premium · 12 new', 'Free · library only', 'Plex Pass · 3 new').
discoveryHome.ui: Inspired by Plex home ('Recommended on Your Services' + 'Your Selected Services'). Helps discover new songs recommended by EACH configured service while keeping provenance explicit — never a generic 'recommended', always name the source.

queueDisplay.decision: REDESIGN — user dislikes the current queue treatment. Two acceptable forms: (A) an UNDER-THE-PLAYER strip directly beneath the Now Playing media, or (B) a dedicated SIDE PANEL. NOT the current treatment. Decide in Phase 3 (mock BOTH in Storybook, confirm with user, then build).
queueDisplay.ui: Queue = current track + Up Next with drag-reorder, remove, Clear, and the autoplay/radio toggle; reachable without leaving Now Playing.

smartPlay.path: App queue; advance on IFrame onStateChange ENDED(0) -> loadVideoById(next); seed from search/playlists. YT internal Mix/Radio (RD) is NOT official.
smartPlay.ui: Endless 'PhonoDeck Radio (built from YouTube search)' toggle in Up Next; the visible player still plays each track; upcoming queue is always shown (no invisible auto-advance).

rules: Hover/focus a row -> leading #/artwork becomes a focusable Play button
Single-click the Play button = plays immediately
Right-click = context menu (Play, Like, Add to Playlist, Add to Queue, Go to Artist/Album, Share, Copy Link, Open)

phase5ReadinessSurfaces.decision: Phase 5 is a conservative readiness-aware surface stabilization pass, not a new catalog-provider build.

statusMapping.notConnected: Connect [Source] in Settings to use this surface.
statusMapping.notConfigured: Use the provider reason, e.g. 'No Plex music server is configured.'
statusMapping.missingScope: Reconnect [Source] to grant the required scope.
statusMapping.rateLimited: Showing cached results where available. Try again later.
statusMapping.providerUnavailable: [Source] is unavailable. Last checked time/scope should be shown when available.
statusMapping.partial: Some [Source] data is unavailable; showing what is ready.
statusMapping.failed: Couldn't load [Source]. Retry or manage it in Settings.

phase5ReadinessSurfaces.albumsArtistsRule: Albums and Artists need real catalog metadata from Plex, Spotify, Own Files, or another approved provider. YouTube-derived groupings are limited/derived and must be labeled as such; unknown year, label, credits, bio, and listener fields must remain unavailable, not synthesized.

phase6OperationalSurfaces.decision: Phase 6 makes Storage, Devices, and Provider Lab evidence-bearing operational surfaces without adding fake downloads, fake devices, or live provider mutations.

storage.hardPolicy: YouTube, YouTube Music, and Spotify owned-media assets are blocked. Cache controls affect metadata/artwork only.

devices.hardPolicy: Use AVRoutePickerView/system UI; do not fabricate route inventory, HomePod defaults, Cast targets, Premium tier, or cross-device history.

providerLab.hardPolicy: Provider Lab shows official provider behavior plus a disabled-policy row for undocumented metadata; it does not perform live writes, hidden media extraction, or undocumented metadata calls.

components.name: RootView
components.purpose: Top-level window composition: sidebar + detail + bottom NowPlayingBar + toolbar.

components.name: SidebarView
components.purpose: Left navigation; 3 grouped sections of SidebarButton rows.

components.name: SidebarSection
components.purpose: A titled group of sidebar items.

components.name: SidebarButton
components.purpose: One sidebar nav row (SF Symbol + title + selection highlight).

components.name: NowPlayingBar
components.purpose: Persistent bottom transport bar; honest per-source controls (YouTube vs native).

components.name: LibraryHomeView
components.purpose: Fallback library home when active source is not YouTube-backed (rarely shown).

components.name: PhonoDeckWelcomeSheet
components.purpose: Lean first-run welcome sheet (mission + Continue).

components.name: SongResultRow
components.purpose: One song/search result row: artwork, title, channel, actions (play/info/lyrics/queue/sources). Compact / art-led list row (search results, shelves) — vs the multi-column TrackTable for collection detail.

components.name: TrackTable
components.purpose: Multi-column track listing for playlist/album/songs detail (Apple Music parity): columns # · Title · Artist · Album · Time that stretch to fill and are resizable, with click-to-sort headers — SwiftUI Table. Use this (not a SongResultRow list) wherever Apple Music shows a table.

components.name: SongContextMenu
components.purpose: Right-click / long-press menu on a track (row or table): Play Next, Add to Library, Add to Playlist, Get Info, Favourite, Suggest Less, Share — mirrors (never hides) the row's primary actions. SwiftUI .contextMenu.

components.name: QueueItemRow
components.purpose: One queue row: index, artwork, title, channel, remove/play/select.

components.name: SongCarouselShelf
components.purpose: Horizontal scrolling shelf of song cards (artwork + title).

components.name: PlaylistArtworkCard
components.purpose: Playlist tile: square thumbnail + title + song count.

components.name: SubscriptionAvatarCard
components.purpose: Circular channel avatar + title for the subscriptions shelf.

components.name: AlbumCard
components.purpose: Album grid tile: artwork + title + artist + source badge.

components.name: ArtistCard
components.purpose: Artist grid tile: artwork + name + track/album counts.

components.name: MusicCollectionDetailPanel
components.purpose: Album/artist detail with tabs (songs/reviews/related); the songs tab is a TrackTable + per-row SongContextMenu.

components.name: MusicCollectionToolbar
components.purpose: Collection top toolbar (Apple Music parity), in the control layer: Find-in-collection search field + sort/filter menu (Playlist Order · Title · Genre · Year · Artist · Album · Time + Ascending/Descending) + download + overflow (…).

components.name: ReadinessCallout
components.purpose: Compact readiness/status row derived from SourceProviderStatus; one per affected surface, using existing ServiceAccountRow anatomy and non-color-only status text.

components.name: ContextShelf
components.purpose: Text-only context chips (e.g. subscriptions/history summary).

components.name: LibraryMetricTile
components.purpose: Value + symbol + title card (cache stats, queue position).

components.name: LibraryEmptyShelf
components.purpose: Empty list state with icon + message + Search button.

components.name: SourcePill
components.purpose: Rounded source badge (name + SF Symbol + tint).

components.name: SourceBadge
components.purpose: Dense source marker variants for rows/cards/details: dot, corner, and pill. Always paired with accessible source text; never color-only.

components.name: MusicServicesSection
components.purpose: Contents of the Settings 'Music Services' Form section: one ServiceAccountRow per source. YouTube+YouTube Music fold into a single Google row (state/actions injected); Spotify/Plex via SourcesOverviewModel; Own Files planned.

components.name: ServiceAccountRow
components.purpose: Unified native Form row for ONE music service, matching the Storybook .srow design: subtle brand-tinted SF Symbol tile (rgba(brand,0.16) bg + brand-colored icon, NO solid fill) + name + one-line description (or connected account) + single right action (accent Connect / neutral Disconnect / 'Coming soon'). NO capability grid. Replaces SourceIntegrationRow + AccountSettingsRow + SourceCapabilityCard.

components.name: SourceIntegrationRow
components.purpose: SUPERSEDED by ServiceAccountRow; no longer used in Settings.

components.name: AccountSettingsRow
components.purpose: SUPERSEDED — Google account state folded into the YouTube & YouTube Music ServiceAccountRow.

components.name: ScopeDisclosurePanel
components.purpose: OAuth scope disclosure + explanation.

components.name: CacheSettingsPanel
components.purpose: Artwork/metadata cache metrics + clear buttons.

components.name: StorageBoundaryPanel
components.purpose: Cache refresh/settings actions.

components.name: StorageCacheActionsPanel
components.purpose: Clear artwork/metadata/all cache.

components.name: StorageAssetsPanel
components.purpose: List of stored assets when present.

components.name: StorageSourcePolicyRow
components.purpose: Per-source storage policy row.

components.name: StorageSafetyPanel
components.purpose: Storage safety information.

components.name: StorageCacheClearReceipt
components.purpose: Receipt after clearing metadata/artwork cache: target, completedAt, previous bytes, and retained-data statement.

components.name: DeviceFactRow
components.purpose: Device capability row (symbol, title, status, detail).

components.name: DeviceRouteSupportState
components.purpose: Evidence status for route capability rows: available, limited, notExposed, planned.

components.name: AirPlayRoutePickerButton
components.purpose: NSViewRepresentable wrapping AVRoutePickerView (system AirPlay menu).

components.name: ProviderComparisonCard
components.purpose: Engine comparison results card (official provider plus disabled undocumented metadata policy row).

components.name: ProviderComparisonRun
components.purpose: Provider Lab diagnostic run summary: run id, query, timestamps, elapsed time, provider results, cache/request evidence.

components.name: MusicFactTile
components.purpose: Media fact tile (duration/year/quality/bitrate/label).

components.name: MusicInfoLine
components.purpose: Single info line (title + value).

components.name: CollectionInfoPlaceholder
components.purpose: Honest placeholder for unavailable info (ratings/related).

components.name: CachedArtworkImage
components.purpose: Disk-cached artwork image with fallback placeholder (Media/ArtworkCache.swift).

components.name: YouTubeMusicWebPlayerView
components.purpose: NSViewRepresentable wrapping WKWebView for the official YouTube IFrame embed.

components.name: YouTubeMusicWebPlayerController
components.purpose: ObservableObject managing the embed player state via JS bridge.

components.name: AmbientBackdrop
components.purpose: Artwork-derived blurred ambient gradient behind Now Playing (inspector + full screen). Reduce-Motion / Increase-Contrast aware.

components.name: TopPicksShelf
components.purpose: Home hero shelf of large rounded BigPickCards with an eyebrow provenance label (Apple Music 'Top Picks for You').

components.name: BigPickCard
components.purpose: Large rounded recommendation card: EYEBROW provenance label (honest, e.g. 'From your YouTube activity') + title + subtitle + artwork.

components.name: ArtistPageView
components.purpose: Cinematic artist page: full-bleed hero (image + name overlay + Play + Like + overflow), Latest Release card beside Top Songs, Essential/Related shelf. Feeds the About inspector.

components.name: FullScreenPlayerView
components.purpose: Optional full-screen Now Playing takeover: 16:9 media (YT embed / native artwork) over AmbientBackdrop, transport, scrubber, volume, Lyrics toggle.

glossary._note: Friendly/spoken name -> real Swift name, so we share vocabulary. When you say the friendly name, I will map to the real component.

burger icon / sidebar toggle / hamburger.does: Shows/hides the LEFT SidebarView. Note: it does NOT open the right Now Playing panel.

now playing slide-in (right) / right pan.does: Right column (width 420) showing the visible YouTube player, transport, selected-song info, related, and Up Next. Currently a fixed column, not a slide-in — see consolidationNotes.

bottom player / mini player / transport.does: Persistent bottom bar; honest controls per active source.

connect buttons / add source buttons.does: Start Google OAuth (YouTube) or mark Spotify/Plex as planned.

song row.does: One song line item with actions.

track table / song table (columns).does: Multi-column, sortable, stretching track list (# · Title · Artist · Album · Time) for playlist/album detail.

sort & filter menu / sort picker.does: Toolbar dropdown: Playlist Order · Title · Genre · Year · Artist · Album · Time + Ascending/Descending.

find in playlist / collection search.does: Toolbar search field scoped to the open collection.

row context menu / track context menu.does: Right-click track actions: Play Next, Add to Library, Get Info, Favourite, Share.

account menu / person icon.real: accountMenu (person.crop.circle) in nowPlayingPanel header + RootView toolbar

home.real: Home section (formerly library landing / listenNow) — discovery shelves

right panel / now playing inspector.real: NowPlayingPanel (tabs: Now Playing / Up Next / Lyrics / About)
right panel / now playing inspector.does: Single 420pt trailing inspector; replaces the old fixed nowPlayingPanel + separate inspector/related/upNext.

brand header.does: Where the PhonoDeck brand lives (NOT the window title).

like / heart.does: Like on YouTube (videos.rate) / Favorite / Save — source-truthful.

lyrics tab.does: Time-synced lyrics (provider-gated) or honest empty state.

about tab / info.does: Artist bio/trivia + credits + related, each attributed to its source.

autoplay / radio.does: 'PhonoDeck Radio (built from YouTube search)' endless play.

ambient backdrop / glow.does: Artwork-derived blurred gradient behind Now Playing media.

full screen player.does: Optional full-screen Now Playing takeover (16:9 media + ambient).

artist page.does: Cinematic artist page (hero + Latest Release + Top Songs + related).

top picks.does: Home hero recommendations with honest provenance eyebrow labels.

coordinators.name: PlaybackCoordinator
coordinators.owns: currentTrack, state, elapsedTime; MPNowPlayingInfoCenter + MPRemoteCommandCenter via NowPlayingController

coordinators.name: YouTubePlaybackBridge
coordinators.owns: canPlayPrevious/Next, playerState, volume, isMuted, currentTime, duration; control closures

coordinators.name: YouTubeMusicWebPlayerController
coordinators.owns: load/play/pause/seek/volume via JS bridge; currentVideoID; player events

playback.honestControlsRule: While a YouTube-backed source is active: AppState disables MPRemoteCommandCenter; NowPlayingBar disables controls the embed can't truthfully perform (e.g. system volume), shows player state + 'native controls limited'. Native sources (Plex/local) get full MPNowPlayingInfoCenter/MPRemoteCommandCenter.

flows.name: First launch (signed out)
steps: Library shows libraryEmptyState with Connect YouTube / Add Spotify / Add Plex.
No token-gated API calls while signed out; no Now Playing bar (no real item).

flows.name: Connect YouTube (Google OAuth)
steps: loadLibraryData(): activity, playlists, subscriptions; refresh discovery.

flows.name: Search a song and play
steps: nowPlayingPanel videoSurface loads the visible embed; NowPlayingBar mirrors selection.
Queue adopted from the surrounding list.

flows.name: Create/add to playlist
steps: New YouTube Music Playlist (needs playlist write scope).
Add via SongResultRow 'Add' menu -> searchViewModel.add(video, playlist).

flows.name: Queue / Up Next
steps: Add to Queue from a row context action.
Queue section (Cmd+5) shows QueueItemRow list + position.
upNextPanel inside nowPlayingPanel mirrors Up Next.
Next/Previous use the local queue (NowPlayingBar + YouTubePlaybackBridge).

consolidationNotes._intent: Clean, consolidated baseline before adding features. These are candidates to review — do not remove without approval.
items: listenNow: deprecated and redirected to library; keep enum case but it is not in the sidebar. Consider removing the case + handler once confirmed unused.
providerLab: developer/diagnostic tool. Recommend hiding from the shipping sidebar (keep behind a debug flag) per design-system-research §2.
LibraryHomeView: fallback for non-YouTube sources; effectively dead while activeSource defaults to youtubeMusic and only YT is wired. Revisit when Plex/local land.

Now Playing model: the right nowPlayingPanel (fixed column) and the bottom NowPlayingBar both present transport; Queue exists both as the queue section and the upNextPanel. Decide one canonical Up Next surface (Apple Music shows a right-side Up Next/Queue panel toggled from the bottom bar) and align the rest.
Two YouTube source kinds (youtube vs youtubeMusic) both player-backed — confirm whether both belong in the shipping source list or whether youtube is an internal detail.
Huge view file: YouTubeMusicNativeConceptView.swift hosts most panels/components. Consider extracting components into their own files as part of consolidation (no behavior change).
